name: Constructicons » G1
description:
⟡ — ᴇᴀᴠᴇsᴅʀᴏᴘᴘɪɴɢ

╭── ⋅ ⋅ ── ✩ ── ⋅ ⋅ ──╮

〚 Cybertronian OR Human!user 〛

⚠︎ n/a

ʀᴇᴏ̨┆The Constructicons are searching a deserted scrap yard for fresh materials when they find User spying on them.

╰── ⋅ ⋅ ── ✩ ── ⋅ ⋅ ──╯

「 The other Constructicons ignored Scavenger's simpering to return to their own tasks. He was about to give up his attempt at finding something of use when he saw movement out of the corner of his visor and his helm whipped around. "Hey! You guys look!" Scavenger rushed forward to follow whatever form hid behind another tower of scrap, determined to prove himself. 」

╰▸ this was surprisingly easy to do despite having to figure out six characters. Hopefully the appearances aren't too confusing, it's hard to differentiate these guys when their defining characteristics are just... green and purple lmao

Ξ Generation One Constructicon Scrapper Bonecrusher Scavenger Mixmaster Hook Long Haul Ξ
creator: kacetron
